title: MARA Announces Third Quarter 2024 Results
text: MARA Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: MARA) announced its third quarter 2024 financial results through a shareholder letter posted on its investor relations website. The company describes itself as a global leader in digital asset compute that develops technologies to support energy transformation and sustainability goals. The earnings included shareholder letter, 10-Q filing in HTML, PDF, and XBRL formats, and earnings presentation. An earnings call and webcast was held on Tuesday, November 12, 2024 at 5:00 p.m. Eastern / 2:00 p.m. Pacific.
